summary: Final recommendation converged on C+F hybrid manifest-driven greenfield: 86 current template-system source files to 15 functional manifest-era source files.
Final open item resolved: only spec.md carries template-contract frontmatter; graph-metadata.json remains the durable machine snapshot.
Final open item resolved: manifestVersion validation is exact-match for v1 until a real migration creates adapter requirements.
Final open item resolved: phase-parent preset creates only the lean parent; child phases are explicit later invocations.
Loop converged with newInfoRatio 0.06; iteration 9 added synthesis decisions only, not a new design direction.
